task_completion.description: Verify that the bookmark bar contains the four required folders and no junk bookmarks.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Chrome bookmark bar or Bookmark Manager shows folders exactly named 'Old World Appellations', 'New World Regions', 'Distributors & Allocations', and 'Education & Reference'. There should be no visible bookmarks for ESPN, Netflix, Facebook, X, or Twitter.

task_completion.description: Verify the download directory and 'ask where to save' setting.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In Chrome Settings > Downloads, the 'Location' field ends with 'Documents/Tech_Sheets' and the toggle for 'Ask where to save each file before downloading' is enabled.

task_completion.description: Verify the font sizes and translation settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In Chrome Settings (Appearance / Languages), the Medium (or Standard) font size is set to 18, the Minimum font size is set to 14, and the 'Offer to translate pages' toggle is enabled.

task_completion.description: Verify that the required Chrome flags are enabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the chrome://flags page, 'Smooth Scrolling' and 'Parallel downloading' are visible and their status dropdowns are set to 'Enabled' (typically highlighted in blue).

task_completion.description: Verify the custom search engines for Wine-Searcher and GuildSomm.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In Chrome Settings > Manage search engines and site search, there are entries with shortcuts/keywords 'ws' (for wine-searcher.com) and 'gs' (for guildsomm.com).
In Chrome Settings > On startup, 'Open a specific page or set of pages' is selected, and both 'sevenfifty.com' and 'binwise.com' are listed as pages to open.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Chrome browser GUI to configure settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Chrome browser window with various settings pages open, rather than terminal windows editing Chrome's JSON preference files directly.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply type the expected answers into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The settings, bookmarks, and flags should be visible within the actual Chrome interface, not in a text editor like gedit or nano.

integrity.description: The agent used the real chrome://flags page.
integrity.visual_evidence: The chrome://flags page should have the standard Chrome flags UI with the search bar, warning text, and experiment list, not a mock HTML page.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected bookmark folders: 'Old World Appellations', 'New World Regions', 'Distributors & Allocations', 'Education & Reference'. Junk domains to remove: espn.com, netflix.com, facebook.com, x.com, twitter.com. Default font size: 18. Minimum font size: 14. Download directory: 'Tech_Sheets'. Startup URLs: 'sevenfifty.com', 'binwise.com'. Search engine keywords: 'ws' (wine-searcher.com), 'gs' (guildsomm.com). Chrome flags to enable: 'smooth-scrolling', 'enable-parallel-downloading'.
